kiosk.Title: Promote an Event
kiosk.Summary: Sponsored listings rotate through designated promotional placements, in‑app displays, and transition panels to maximize visibility and user engagement.
Facts: Various promo packages will become available as the platform is developed. This may include additional inclusion beyond the mobile app.
Platform packages provide network‑wide inclusion, with planned placement across the website, Facebook, the RRG TV channel, and additional outlets as they are introduced.

kiosk.Title: Changes & Corrections
kiosk.Summary: Corrections or updates may be submitted directly to our team. Email us to get started.
Facts: The report tool will become available in an update scheduled in July.
